title: Cryptr
description:
Village by village, dungeon by dungeon, the corruption swallowed the land. You are one of many champions sent to battle the dark.

GATHER YOUR PARTY. DESCEND. END THE EVIL.

Cryptr is a 1-4 player co-op hack-and-slash dungeon crawler. Pick a champion, drop into corrupted, hand-built dungeons, and carve a path to the last demon at the source. Play online with up to three friends, or solo with AI allies filling your party.

CHOOSE YOUR CHAMPION 
Six classes, each with its own kit, ultimate ability, and talent tree:

• Knight: sword and shield. Ascends to the Paladin.

• Ranger: bow. Ascends to the Warden.

• Wizard: spellcasting. Ascends to the Necromancer.

• Berserker: dual melee. Ascends to the Ravager.

• Dwarf Brawler: bare-knuckle fists and kicks.

• Druid: nature magic and party healing. Shapeshifts into a towering Oak Ent.

Master a base class to unlock its Ascended form. Spend talent points across themed paths, fork into build-defining keystones and capstones, and respec anytime for a small gold fee.

CRAWL THE CRYPTS 
Fight through hand-built dungeons across four regions: the Ruins of Lordenfel, the Frostspire Citadel, the Drowned Coast, and the Blighted Sands. Objectives shift from spawner hunts and survival gauntlets to relic escorts and village defense. A boss waits at the bottom.

SET YOUR CHALLENGE 
Choose Relaxed, Normal, Hard, or Nightmare from the menu. Turn it up for denser hordes, more Elites, armored shield brutes, and run modifiers that reshape the fight. The toughest crypts pay the best loot.

LOOT AND GROW Clear a dungeon, claim your haul. Weapons and cosmetics drop at random, sorted by rarity color, and customized at the merchant in the Tower. Rack up Steam achievements and unlock every Ascended form along the way.

PLAY YOUR WAY 
Cryptr bends to you. Full controller support, remappable keyboard and gamepad controls, and a zoom-out twin-stick overhead view for the Gauntlet Legends angle. Everyone on the same PC keeps their own save profile. Build dungeons from the game's own art in the built-in Level Editor, with custom dungeon play on the way.

Gather your party, grow your power, and summon the force that ends the demon at the root.
description_short: An old evil is loose and spreading. Fight through cursed dungeons with up to three friends, or solo with AI allies. Loot, level up, and build your own classes and dungeons to share.
